_note: Two-plane decomposition for TKT-0009 / ADR-0121 — shipping ui-toolbar, a Pattern-class UIContainerElement action bar (role=toolbar + roving focus; floating/embedded posture via the elevation surface axis, not a positioning machine). OUTSIDE-IN nodes = the surfaces the component + its catalog row + its site pages touch (controls/, a2ui catalog + corpus, site). INSIDE-OUT actions = what the shipped control must DO. Crossed via hosts. plan:true — each leaf carries the checkable acceptance predicate the builder's tests must satisfy; no source exists yet under controls/toolbar/. Reuse-heavy by design: the roving-focus trait, the ADR-0015 surface seam, the ADR-0039 align/justify dialect, and the geometry.md-named Pattern class are all reused, not invented (no novelty leg). LLD-C10/C11 (the Toolbar catalog row + the document-row-toolbar corpus upgrade) are a2ui-package build slices dispatched to a2ui-builder after the component is green.

nodes.label: ui-toolbar (the shipped Pattern-class control)
tag + identity
tag ui-toolbar, class UIToolbarElement, folder controls/toolbar/, extends UIContainerElement, tier pattern
nodes.accept: `npm test toolbar` — jsdom: `customElements.get('ui-toolbar')` resolves; the instance is `instanceof UIContainerElement` and NOT `instanceof UIFormElement`; `controls/toolbar/toolbar.ts` exists and self-defines on import (the fleet self-define precedent); the descriptor resolves `tier: pattern` (SPEC-R1)

nodes.label: props schema (surfaceProps spread + orientation/align/justify/gap/overflow/label)
elevation/brightness — the ADR-0015 surfaceProps spread (the F1 posture lever), enum [0,1,2,3,-1,-2,-3] default 0 reflect
nodes.accept: `npm test toolbar` — jsdom: elevation/brightness read 0 unset, reflect on set, and the values/enum match the shared UIContainerElement.surfaceProps seam ui-row/ui-tabs use (not a redefined copy) — the descriptor↔props trip-wire (n17) is green (SPEC-R2)

nodes.label: orientation prop — reflected enum ['horizontal','vertical'], default 'horizontal'
nodes.accept: `npm test toolbar` — jsdom: unset ⇒ 'horizontal'; `el.orientation='vertical'` reflects `orientation="vertical"` and back; an out-of-vocabulary value fails open to 'horizontal' (SPEC-R2 AC2/AC3)

nodes.label: align/justify/gap layout props — the ADR-0039 box-alignment dialect, defaults align=center, justify=start, gap=sm
nodes.accept: `npm test toolbar` — jsdom: align/justify/gap read their defaults (center/start/sm — NOTE align default center is the bar look, not ui-row's start), reflect on set, and fail-open on garbage; each value vocabulary matches the ADR-0039 dialect ui-row uses (SPEC-R2)

nodes.label: overflow prop enum ['wrap','scroll'] default 'wrap' + label string default '' — NO size/density/wrap/reflow/posture prop
nodes.accept: `npm test toolbar` — jsdom: overflow reads 'wrap' unset (F4, never-hide-an-action default) and reflects; label reads '' unset and reflects; a grep of static props confirms NO size/density/wrap/reflow/posture prop exists (SPEC-R2)

nodes.label: role=toolbar + ariaOrientation/ariaLabel reflection via ElementInternals (never a host attribute)
nodes.accept: `npm test toolbar` — jsdom: `el.internals.role === 'toolbar'`; the host carries NO role/aria-label/aria-orientation attribute; `internals.ariaOrientation === 'vertical'` iff orientation=vertical (else null); a non-empty `label` sets `internals.ariaLabel`, clearing to null when label='' (SPEC-R3)

nodes.label: roving-focus wiring — the existing trait over the item query, loop:false, typeAhead:false, focus-only onMove (decoupled from selection)
nodes.accept: `npm run test:browser toolbar` (Chromium+WebKit) — exactly one item tabindex=0, rest -1 (one Tab stop); ArrowRight/Left (horizontal) or ArrowDown/Up (vertical) moves REAL focus to the next/prev non-disabled item and STOPS at the ends (no wrap); Home/End jump to first/last; disabled items are skipped; grouped-in-a-ui-row items still rove (descendant discovery); re-armed after disconnect/reconnect with no duplicate listeners (SPEC-R4)

nodes.label: no events, no value — the toolbar commits nothing (negative control)
nodes.accept: `npm test toolbar` — jsdom: any click/keyboard/prop-change dispatches NO change/input/select/open/close/toggle (or any) event from the host; the element is not form-associated (face.formAssociated:false). A biting negative control on the roving path — a key that moves focus emits nothing (SPEC-R5)

nodes.label: toolbar.css host-as-flex — orientation→flex-direction, align→align-items, justify→justify-content (between/around/evenly→space-*), gap→--ui-space, overflow=wrap|scroll; NO named slots
nodes.accept: `npm test toolbar` + `npm run test:browser toolbar` — the CSS scopes to `:where(ui-toolbar)`, has zero `[slot=…]` selector (host-as-flex, ui-row precedent); computed `justify-content` is `space-between` for justify=between; `flex-wrap:wrap` for overflow=wrap and `nowrap`+scroll region for overflow=scroll; `flex-direction:column` for orientation=vertical (SPEC-R6)

nodes.label: Pattern-class geometry — no size prop; items take their own control height; min-block-size floor + gap/pad off --ui-space; ambient [scale]/[density]
nodes.accept: `npm run test:browser toolbar` — a bare toolbar with one small ui-button renders block-size ≥ the min-block-size floor (the whole-shape bar floor, not the button height); `[density=spacious]` widens the gap vs `[density=compact]` (rhythm rides density); the descriptor declares geometry.sizeClass:pattern and NO size attribute (SPEC-R7)

nodes.label: posture via the surface axis + [data-box] z-scope — floating = elevation≥1 raised plane, embedded = elevation 0 flush; NO position/anchor/overlay machinery
nodes.accept: `npm run test:browser toolbar` — elevation=2 paints a raised surface (--ui-container-bg repointed, ADR-0015) and establishes the ADR-0052 isolation scope; elevation=0 is transparent/flush; a grep of toolbar.ts finds NO position/anchor/showPopover/ResizeObserver and NO overlay/dismissal trait import (SPEC-R8)

nodes.label: token surface + forced-colors — --ui-toolbar-* roles, container surface seam, a forced-colors block
nodes.accept: `npm test` (family-coherence.test.ts) — the single toolbar.css declares the --ui-toolbar-* chain (gap/pad/min-block-size), consumes the container surface seam, and carries a `@media (forced-colors: active)` block keeping the bar legible (the ui-tabs precedent); fleet invariants green (SPEC-R9)

nodes.label: toolbar.md descriptor — tier:pattern, extends UIContainerElement, events:[], slots:[], role:toolbar (internals), keyboard map
nodes.accept: `npm test` (family-coherence.test.ts A-group) — the descriptor exists, tag/class/folder aligned, tier:pattern, extends UIContainerElement (in BASE_CLASSES — no BAD_EXTENDS filter needed), events:[] and slots:[] present, the keyboard map documents Arrow-along-orientation + Home/End + roving-tabindex + no-wrap/no-type-ahead (SPEC-R10)

nodes.label: descriptor ↔ static props trip-wire
nodes.accept: `npm test toolbar` — the `attributes[]` fence in toolbar.md mirrors `static props` 1:1 (elevation/brightness/orientation/align/justify/gap/overflow/label) via compareDescriptorToProps (the standing per-control trip-wire, red on any drift); compareDescriptorToSource confirms no undocumented styled slot/role/state (SPEC-R10)

nodes.label: catalog disposition — A2UI-emittable (F7)
Toolbar default-catalog row (attrs + children) — a2ui build slice
nodes.accept: `npm test` (a2ui catalog-coverage) — the moment toolbar.md ships, `Toolbar` enters FLEET_TYPES (ADR-0087); the coverage gate stays green because a REAL Toolbar catalog row exists (mapping orientation/align/justify/gap/overflow/elevation/brightness/label + a children item list, the Row precedent), NOT an EXCLUSION_ALLOWLIST entry; the residue-guard confirms Toolbar is a catalog key, not an allowlist member (SPEC-R11)

nodes.label: document-row-toolbar corpus seed upgraded to the real Toolbar type
nodes.accept: `npm test` (a2ui corpus judge/coverage) — catalog-coverage.ts:184-235's hand-composed Row{justify:between} action cluster is replaced by a real Toolbar node (its buttons/overlays as item children); the seed renders through the Toolbar type and passes the validation + judge gates (the same hand-composed-shape→real-type upgrade the seed's Row[Icon,Text]→Attachment comment records) (SPEC-R11)

nodes.label: gates + surfaces
site pages {doc,demo} — the demo showing BOTH postures (embedded + floating)
nodes.accept: `npm test` (site-coverage.test.ts) — toolbar-doc.html (descriptor-derived API page) and toolbar-demo.html exist, satisfying the tier:pattern required {doc,demo} set; the demo renders at least one embedded (elevation=0) AND one floating (elevation≥1) toolbar, each populated with multiple real controls, plus the one-Tab-stop roving callout (SPEC-R12)

nodes.label: representative gallery/preview specimen (the example-builder concern)
nodes.accept: `npm test` (site gallery/preview suites) — the toolbar's preview specimen is a POPULATED action bar (e.g. bold/italic/underline + alignment + undo/redo), not a one-child lorem stub (the whole-shape/representative-specimen law); the knob config surfaces orientation/align/justify/gap/overflow/elevation as one knob per prop of the right type (SPEC-R12)

nodes.label: jsdom probes — props reflect/fail-open, ARIA-via-internals, no-event negative control, item discovery
nodes.accept: `npm test toolbar` green — reflection round-trips + fail-open for every enum prop; role/orientation/label via internals only (no host attribute); the no-event negative control bites; #items() discovers focusable descendants in DOM order excluding disabled, tolerant of ui-row nesting

nodes.label: cross-engine browser probes — real-focus roving + whole-shape both postures
nodes.accept: `npm run test:browser toolbar` (Chromium+WebKit) — the roving-focus real-focus-order proof (one Tab stop, arrow-along-orientation, Home/End, no wrap, no type-ahead, disabled-skip, reconnect re-arm) AND the whole-shape proof (a populated toolbar renders as a real-width/height bar in a realistic flex container, embedded and floating). jsdom-green ≠ done — these are browser-only (the checkbox/date-time precedent)

nodes.label: barrel/exports/size integration (ADR-0080 marginal)
nodes.accept: `npm run check && npm test` green (barrels.test.ts, exports drift gate); `npm run size` run by hand (ADR-0040 §3) — the leave-one-out marginal for `toolbar` measured and pinned if it changes the family total materially

nodes.label: independent component-reviewer GO before commit
nodes.accept: a fresh-context `component-reviewer` pass returns GO against the descriptor + anatomy + geometry + contract fidelity (the standing per-control-wave DoD); generator ≠ critic

actions.label: identify itself under the fleet ui-* tag law as a Pattern-class control in the controls/ tier, extending the container base
carry the elevation/brightness surface axis as its floating/embedded posture lever, reusing the fleet seam
carry an orientation axis driving flex direction and the roving-focus axis
carry align/justify/gap in the fleet box-alignment dialect, tuned for a tight centered bar
carry a CSS-only overflow axis (wrap/scroll) and an author accessible-name, and own no size/density/posture prop
announce role=toolbar and its orientation/name through ElementInternals, never a host attribute
rove focus across its focusable items as one Tab stop, decoupled from any selection or commit
emit no events and hold no value — arrangement + focus only, not a command bus
lay out as a host-as-flex bar whose light-DOM children ARE the items, with no named slots
size itself by the Pattern-class geometry — item-driven height, a min-block bar floor, ambient scale/density
read as floating or embedded purely through the surface plane + z-scope, owning no positioning or overlay machinery
declare its --ui-toolbar-* token chain and stay legible under forced-colors
record its public surface truthfully in a tier:pattern descriptor
keep its descriptor in 1:1 bijection with its live props
enter the generative-UI catalog as an emittable Toolbar type with a real row
collapse the hand-composed corpus toolbar seed onto the real Toolbar type
give the fleet an API doc page and a both-postures demo page
show its real job in a representative preview specimen with one knob per prop
prove props/ARIA/no-event/item-discovery under jsdom
prove real-focus roving and the whole-shape bar cross-engine, both postures
stay within the family size budget, exported through the public barrel
pass independent review before shipping

same class declaration site
same class declaration site

the ariaLabel reflection reads the label prop

the CSS repoints flex props off the align/justify/gap attributes
overflow=wrap|scroll drives flex-wrap and the scroll region
orientation drives flex-direction
the Pattern geometry rides on the flex layout (min-block floor, gap off --ui-space)

the token chain + forced-colors block live in the same single toolbar.css
the descriptor's attributes[] fence describes the live prop set
